did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Photocopies and memorabilia reflecting on Smith's career in radio ("Let's Make a Dress") and acknowledgement by the Institute for Education by Radio.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Helen Powell Smith joined the Department of Textiles and Clothing as Acting Assistant Professor and extension specialist in clothing in 1937. She was appointed Assistant Professor in 1939 and Associate Professor in 1943. In 1952 she became head of the department, a position she held until her retirement in 1958.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photocopies and memorabilia reflecting on Smith's career in radio ("Let's Make a Dress") and acknowledgement by the Institute for Education by Radio.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology.

did.unittitle: Packet of items concerning the radio program "Let's Make a Dress." Includes; "Teaching Dressmaking by Radio," Award of Merit to Station WHCU for Most Effective Radio Program, enrollment form for "Let's Make A Dress," "Education on the Air," and photocopies of notes and photographs.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Helen Powell Smith papers, #23-1-2799. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
